Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Presence]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The Presence is a ghostly entity on Suriel's shoulder that assists her with her powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — The Presence is a component of Suriel that reports information and acknowledges her commands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Suriel's Presence can provide explanatory text in her vision.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Suriel has a Presence that provides information inside her mind.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Suriel's Presence is a gray figure of smoke on her shoulder that communicates with her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Suriel possesses a Presence that can indicate coordinates and report data.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Suriel's Presence can warn her of suspicious things.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Suriel's Presence can report population counts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — The Presence is capable of simple predictions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Suriel used her Presence to request information on Wei Shi Lindon from Cradle.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — Pariana possesses a Presence that can be seized by red power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — Pariana's Presence is a squirming mass of silver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — Suriel's Presence can detect barriers.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Suriel's Presence warned of a detected deviation.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Suriel's Presence is a construct of gray smoke.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Suriel's Presence can materialize a simple white uniform for her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Suriel's Presence can summon images and project reports.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Presence is a sense used to detect the number of transports or individuals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Suriel's Presence is a manifestation that can speak and act independently.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 1''' — Suriel possesses a Presence that can scour the future.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — A Presence is a type of entity or power used in Abidan testing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Cirian's Presence is a cube of blue light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Presences can communicate and signal intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — A Reaper's Presence can manifest as a creature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Presence is a guiding force used by trainers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — A Presence is a tool that can remember more than a person.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — The Presence delivered the warning from Sector Eleven Control.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
